theorem P2_implies_P1_and_P3
    {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A ∧ Topology.P3 A := by
  intro hP2
  -- First, prove P1
  have hP1 : Topology.P1 A := by
    dsimp [Topology.P1]
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ Set.interior (Set.closure (Set.interior A)) := hP2 hx
    exact interior_subset hx'
  -- Next, prove P3
  have hP3 : Topology.P3 A := by
    dsimp [Topology.P3]
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ Set.interior (Set.closure (Set.interior A)) := hP2 hx
    have hSub' : Set.closure (Set.interior A) ⊆ Set.closure A :=
      closure_mono interior_subset
    have hSub : Set.interior (Set.closure (Set.interior A)) ⊆
                Set.interior (Set.closure A) :=
      interior_mono hSub'
    exact hSub hx'
  exact And.intro hP1 hP3

theorem Topology.P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro h
  exact Set.Subset.trans h interior_subset
